== Notes for [[Item:Q105657|Q105657]] ==

* Wilaadat (Birth): 4th Shaabaan 26 AH (17th May 647 AD)
* Wafaat (Death): 10th Muharram 61 AH (12th October 680 AD)

Source 1: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Abbas_ibn_Ali

Source 2: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Family_tree_of_Ali

Source 3: http://www.balaghah.net/books/imam_ali/body_family_of_i1.html

Source 4: http://www.janathimessage.co.uk/AskTheImam/askimama.asp?qno=465

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000015280339796

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
